Recruit ment

How to Join

Explain your requirements and how to apply.

Requirements

  • Minimum age requirement is 14
  • 3 Hours Monthly
  • Basic communication standards

How to apply

  1. Click the link below to join the discord server.
  2. Wait for a training to be hosted by one of our FTOs.
  3. Complete your training and

Join through the Discord: Click Here
